  as={"h1"}

  children={"Notifikace aplikace"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v1/{application.merchantUrls.notificationEndpoint}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Informovat partnera o změnách v aplikaci.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Primární identifikátor aplikace"},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["PROCESSING","READY","REJECTED","CANCELED"],"description":"Stav aplikace"},"stateReason":{"enum":["PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED","PROCESSING_PREAPPROVED","PROCESSING_APPROVED","PROCESSING_REVIEW","PROCESSING_ALT_OFFER","PROCESSING_SIGNED","READY_TO_SHIP","READY_SHIPPED","READY_DELIVERING","READY_DELIVERED","READY_PAID","REJECTED","CANCELLED_NOT_PAID","CANCELLED_RETURNED"]},"orderNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Číslo objednávky (interní pro e-shop)"},"notificationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Čas vytvoření notifikace (používá formátování [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) formatting)"},"orderState":{"type":"string","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","PAID","CANCELLED","TERMINATED"],"description":"Stav objednávky"},"downPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Částka v menších jednotkách (150000 představuje 1 500) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Měna částky [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Pouze místní měna je povolena (CZK v České republice a EUR na Slovensku)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Aktuální záloha nastavená zákazníkem"},"sendDate":{"type":"string","description":"Čas vytvoření notifikace (používá formátování [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601))"},"sequenceNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Číslo pořadí oznámení"},"checkSum":{"type":"string","description":"Kontrolní součet zprávy - výsledek HMAC se SHA512 (používá se tajný klíč)"}},"required":["id","state","stateReason","orderNumber","notificationDate","orderState","downPayment","sentDate","checkSum","sequenceNumber"],"example":{"id":"01-11200a0ee1","state":"PROCESSING","stateReason":"PROCESSING_APPROVED","orderNumber":"AA234","notificationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","orderState":"PROCESSING","downPayment":{"value":300000,"currency":"CZK"},"sequenceNumber":1,"sentDate":"2017-07-16T00:00:00+02:00","checksum":"443E150D3406F6A8DC62C1DB224AFDD84FA9907071BB1AD9B2C7701031793662191501B26AADF3A31361341EA176C80B23D8A9A5E5B5219538289945FE0C20A7"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
